article.description: — Jaylen Brown had 24 points, seven rebounds and seven assists and the Boston Celtics beat the Dallas Mavericks 120-100 on Friday night in Jayson Tatum's
article.headline: Jayson Tatum scores 15 points in return from Achilles surgery, Celtics beat Mavericks 120-100

images.caption: Jayson Tatum shares what it felt like returning to play 298 days after tearing an Achilles in 2025 East semifinals.
images.name: Jayson Tatum on return to play: 'It was surreal'

article.linkText: Jayson Tatum scores 15 points in return from Achilles surgery, Celtics beat Mavericks 120-100
article.story: BOSTON -- — Jaylen Brown had 24 points, seven rebounds and seven assists and the Boston Celtics beat the Dallas Mavericks 120-100 on Friday night in Jayson Tatum's first game in almost 10 months after rupturing his right Achilles tendon. Tatum had 15 points on 6-of-16 shooting, 12 rebounds and seven assists in a rust-filled 27 minutes. He played in five- and six-minute spurts in his first game since suffering the injury in during Game 4 of Boston’s Eastern Conference semifinal loss to New York in May. Derrick White added 20 points to help Boston win for the fourth time in five games. Dallas has lost six straight. No. 1 overall pick Cooper Flagg, a Maine native playing his first game in TD Garden, had 16 points, eight rebounds and six assists for Dallas. Klay Thompson finished with 19 points, and Naji Marshall had13 points. Tatum missed his first six shots, including three 3-pointers. But he continued to look for his teammates and actively screening to initiate the offense. The Celtics have 19 games remaining in the regular season, including 11 at TD Garden to try to ramp up Tatum for the playoffs. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.

videos.description: Dallas Mavericks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Dallas Mavericks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dallas Mavericks vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Jayson Tatum comes three assists shy of a triple-double in his return to the NBA after an Achilles injury.
videos.headline: Jayson Tatum scores near triple-double in season debut

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Jayson Tatum scores near triple-double in season debut) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Jayson Tatum smiles as he's introduced in the starting lineup for the Celtics for the first time in 299 days.
videos.headline: Jayson Tatum introduced in lineup to rousing ovation

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jayson Tatum introduced in lineup to rousing ovation) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Jayson Tatum throws up a beautiful lob to Neemias Queta.
videos.headline: Tatum throws it up to Queta for nice alley-oop

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Tatum throws it up to Queta for nice alley-oop) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Jayson Tatum takes off for a dunk and comes up short.
videos.headline: Jayson Tatum gets stuffed by the rim

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jayson Tatum gets stuffed by the rim) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Jayson Tatum goes up for the trey, but the shot comes up short.
videos.headline: Jayson Tatum airballs a 3

videos.description: Jayson Tatum puts back the shot for his first points, then drains a trey to send the Boston crowd to their feet.
videos.headline: Jayson Tatum scores his first two baskets in exciting fashion

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jayson Tatum scores his first two baskets in exciting fashion) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Jayson Tatum swishes the 3-pointer from the corner over his defender.
videos.headline: Jayson Tatum pulls up for 3 from the corner

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jayson Tatum pulls up for 3 from the corner) 2026/03/07 ESHEET

videos.description: Hauser comes out of nowhere for block on Flagg
